subcodes.first_line: O thou who art a servant at the sacred threshold of the Most Exalted Beauty, and a partner and participant in servitude at the holy threshold with 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس جمال اعلی و شریک و سهیم در عبودیت آستان مقدس با عبدالبهاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
